title: GoG Sky
description: A Botania Garden of Glass Skybox Port for Fabric
body:
# GoG Sky

**GoG Sky** is a standalone port of the beautiful and dynamic skybox from the "Garden of Glass" mode in Vazkii's [Botania](https://botaniamod.net/) mod. 

This mod brings the breathtaking celestial visuals—including vibrant planets, auroras, and extra stars—to **Fabric 1.21.8** without needing the full Botania mod installed.


## ✨ Features

*   **Enhanced Starfield:** A multi-layered, rotating starfield that adds incredible depth to the night sky.
*   **Visible Planets:** Six unique planets become visible as the sun sets, each with its own orbit and appearance.
*   **Celestial Auroras:** Ethereal rays of light dance across the sky during the night.
*   **Rainbows:** A rare and beautiful rainbow may appear in the sky.
*   **Enlarged Celestials:** A larger, more impressive sun and moon.
*   **Standalone & Lightweight:** No dependencies other than the Fabric API.

## 📜 Credits & License

This mod is an unofficial port and would not be possible without the incredible work of the original creator.

*   **Original Mod:** [Botania](https://github.com/Vazkii/Botania)
*   **Original Author:** **Vazkii**
*   **License:** The code and assets are used under the terms of the **Botania License**. You can read the full license here: [http://botaniamod.net/license.php](http://botaniamod.net/license.php)

In accordance with the Botania License's **Copyleft Clause**, this project is open source and free to share.

*   **Source Code:** [https://github.com/bsfdsagfadg/gog-sky](https://github.com/bsfdsagfadg/gog-sky)

## 🐛 Issues

If you encounter any bugs or visual glitches, please report them on the [Issue Tracker](https://github.com/bsfdsagfadg/gog-sky/issues).

---
*This is a fan-made port and is not affiliated with or endorsed by Vazkii.*
